REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (95 Mccoppin St.#E410, San Francnisco Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Nielsen for and with Karen Mercer. Ric Rocchiccioli (real estate agent) also present as well as the proposed buyer.

The court stated that a waiver of notice by the buyer was necessary, the buyer (Selena Ye Yao) was in court and confirmed that she waived notice. Mr. Rocchiccioli reported that the 25 days were exhausted and that the Mayor's Office of Housing and that they did not exercise their right of first refusal. The sale was confirmed at $735,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed on 5/27/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
